pi_items.source: Task description line 6 and export_result.sh line 71 - both specify the same path
Task description explicitly states 'Execute the procedure for Year 2013', export_result.sh verifies 2013 data, setup_task.sh references Frame Forming location in Jan 2013

Task aggregates by LocationID and month for year 2013. Without direct database query execution, exact row count cannot be determined, but claim is reasonable given AdventureWorks2022 contains multiple manufacturing locations with 2013 data
Task description section 2 explicitly lists all required columns for dbo.vw_WorkCenterMonthlyMetrics view

Task description section 3 explicitly states: 'Columns: LocationID, LocationName, AnalysisYear, MonthsAnalyzed, AvgUtilizationRate, PeakUtilizationRate, AvgCostVariancePct, TotalScheduleSlipDays, BottleneckScore, BottleneckRank'

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real AdventureWorks2022 sample database from Microsoft (https://github.com/Microsoft/sql-server-samples/releases/download/adventureworks/AdventureWorks2022.bak), which contains Production.WorkOrderRouting and Production.Location tables with actual manufacturing data spanning 2013 and 2014. The analysis_year of 2013 and expected_output_path are correctly specified. However, the metadata's required_view_columns list is incomplete, missing TotalWorkOrders, AvgCostVariancePct, and AvgScheduleSlipDays which are mandatory per the task description. The required_table_columns list is significantly incomplete, listing only 4 of the 10 required columns (missing LocationName, MonthsAnalyzed, AvgUtilizationRate, PeakUtilizationRate, AvgCostVariancePct, and TotalScheduleSlipDays). The CSV export path and analysis year are verified as correct.
